suppress.notes: False positive: matched via the generic "opentelemetry:opentelemetry" CPE (LOW confidence), which also covers the Go and C++ OpenTelemetry implementations and unrelated .NET packages (OpenTelemetry.Exporter.Jaeger, OpenTelemetry.Api, OpenTelemetry.Extensions.Propagators). Azure.Monitor.OpenTelemetry.AspNetCore is not affected by any of these.

False positive: matched via the generic "opentelemetry:opentelemetry" CPE (LOW confidence), which also covers the Go and C++ OpenTelemetry implementations and unrelated .NET packages (OpenTelemetry.Exporter.Jaeger, OpenTelemetry.Api, OpenTelemetry.Extensions.Propagators). Microsoft.Azure.Functions.Worker.OpenTelemetry is not affected by any of these.
